email_subject: Application for Performance Marketeer – Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Performance Marketeer position at Robert Half, as advertised. With a background in digital marketing, SEO, and hands-on campaign execution, I am excited about the opportunity to contribute to a growing B2B-focused SME.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and WordPress site builds for client websites. I track performance using tools like Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Ahrefs, and I collaborate with teams to align marketing actions with sales goals. I am comfortable segmenting audiences, coordinating mailings, and supporting event logistics.

I am proactive, result-oriented, and eager to take ownership of marketing campaigns. I speak fluent English and have a good command of Dutch (A2, currently studying). I am digitally savvy and quick to learn new systems.

I would welcome the chance to discuss how my skills align with your needs. Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Performance Marketeer position at Robert Half. As a junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in campaign execution, SEO, and content management, I am drawn to this role's entrepreneurial spirit and the opportunity to drive commercial impact within a growing B2B SME.

Currently, at Episto, I manage on-page SEO and keyword-targeted content for client websites, directly improving organic visibility and supporting sales efforts. I build and maintain WordPress sites using Elementor and Astra, and I track performance with Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, and Ahrefs. This experience has taught me to segment audiences, identify commercial opportunities, and coordinate marketing actions in collaboration with sales teams.

On my own project, mirook.com, I have applied technical SEO and GEO audits, structured data, and entity optimization to enhance search visibility across traditional and AI-powered engines. This project reflects my proactive, result-oriented approach and my ability to take initiative and see projects through.

I am comfortable with administrative follow-up, coordinating mailings, and organizing events. I am digitally strong, quick to learn new tools, and I speak fluent English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level (currently studying). I thrive in dynamic SME environments where I can take broad responsibility and make a visible impact.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my drive and skills can contribute to your team. Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Hands-on experience in executing marketing campaigns (SEO, content, email coordination) that drive commercial opportunities.
Proven ability to segment audiences, identify commercial opportunities, and collaborate with sales teams.
Strong digital skills: WordPress, Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads – quick to learn new systems.
Entrepreneurial and proactive: independently built and optimized a multi-page website (mirook.com) with structured data and GEO.
Fluent English, good Dutch (A2, in progress), and comfortable in a dynamic KMO environment.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in executing marketing campaigns, SEO, and content management. At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site builds for client sites, collaborating with sales teams to drive commercial opportunities. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility. Comfortable with campaign coordination, audience segmentation, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Campaign execution & coordination: audience segmentation, mailing coordination, event support, marketing material management
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
